standard: nghe đồn đông lắm đấy anh, không biết chui vào lọt không nữa.
A: I heard it's going to be really crowded, I don't know if I'll even be able to squeeze through.
B: I heard it's very crowded, I don't know if I'll be able to squeeze in.
C: I've heard it's really crowded there, bro, not sure if we'll be able to squeeze in.

standard: ở đâu bạn cũng biết nhỉ.
A: You know where it is, don't you?
B: You know everywhere, don't you?
C: You know everywhere, huh?

standard: Vậy nên đôi này cũng li hôn rồi.
A: So, that couple has divorced now.
B: So this couple has also divorced.
C: So this couple has also gotten divorced already.

standard: Cả năm được 1, 2 cái hẹn, mà 1 cái hẹn dài gần nửa ngày
A: I only get one or two dates a year, and each one lasts almost half a day.
B: I only get one or two dates a year, and one of them lasts nearly half a day.
C: Only got 1 or 2 dates the whole year, and one date lasts almost half a day.

standard: à vậy thì ngày đó bận việc rồi
A: Oh, then I was busy that day.
B: Oh, in that case, I'm busy on that day.
C: ah so i'm busy that day then

standard: Chiều nào đi mua về mà làm ăn nhé?
A: Let's go buy some ingredients this afternoon so we can start our business, okay?
B: Which afternoon should I go buy it and then get to work?
C: Which afternoon should we go buy some and eat together?

standard: có bạn nhé, mà mình thích uống Sài Gòn cơ
A: Yes, I do, but I prefer drinking Saigon-style coffee.
B: Yes, I do, but I prefer drinking Saigon.
C: I have a friend, but I actually like drinking Saigon [beer]

standard: nay trời mưa không có đi nghênh ngang ngoài đường nhé.
A: It's raining today, so don't wander around outside.
B: It's raining today, so don't go strolling around the streets.
C: It's raining today, so don't go strolling around outside.

standard: Hôm trước tổ chức kế bên mà chưa có vào xem luôn.
A: The event was held next door the other day, but I didn't get a chance to go see it.
B: It was organized right next door the other day, but I didn't even go in to see it.
C: The organization next door held an event the other day, but I haven't even had the chance to go in and check it out yet.

standard: Lên rừng chơi không mày?
A: Want to go hiking in the forest?
B: Want to go to the forest for fun?
C: Do you wanna go up to the forest and hang out?
